title: GINKGOLIDE B
description: Ginkgolide B is a terpene lactone compound extracted from Ginkgo biloba leaves, standardized in extracts like EGb 761. It works primarily as a platelet-activating factor (PAF) antagonist, improves cerebral blood flow, and exhibits neuroprotective and antioxidant properties. It is used for cognitive enhancement, vascular disorders, and neuroprotection in aging and neurodegenerative conditions.

research.title: Human pharmacokinetics of ginkgo terpene lactones and impact of carboxylation in blood on their platelet-activating factor antagonistic activity
research.summary: Ginkgolides A and B showed high systemic exposure with oral bioavailability mostly >100%, terminal half-lives of 6-13 hours, and platelet-activating factor antagonistic activity that is reduced upon carboxylation in blood.

research.title: Ginkgolide B production in cultured cells derived from Ginkgo biloba L. leaves
research.summary: Cell suspension cultures derived from Ginkgo biloba leaves successfully produced ginkgolide B, with maximum production reached by day 13 of subculture using optimized medium conditions.

research.title: Cognitive Impairment and Nootropic Drugs: Mechanism of Action and Spectrum of Effects
research.summary: Ginkgo biloba extracts act through multiple mechanisms including neurotransmitter modulation, cerebral vasodilation, antioxidant activity, and neuroprotection, showing efficacy in cognitive dysfunction from aging and dementia.

sentiment.summary: Users consistently report that Ginkgo biloba improves alertness, concentration, focus, and memory, with beneficial effects on cerebral circulation and neuroprotection. While not extensively discussed as a standalone supplement, it is frequently included in effective cognitive enhancement stacks with positive outcomes.

effects.label: Memory and Learning:
effects.description: Effective for improving cognitive function in aging, dementia, and neurodegenerative conditions through enhanced cerebral blood flow

effects.label: Standardization Matters:
effects.description: EGb 761 extract standardized to 24% flavonoids and 6% terpene lactones (including ginkgolides) shows consistent therapeutic effects

effects.label: Bioavailability Variation:
effects.description: Ginkgolides A and B demonstrate high oral bioavailability (>100%), while ginkgolides C and J show lower bioavailability (6-15%)

effects.label: Long-term Use:
effects.description: Historical use spanning millennia in traditional Chinese medicine, with modern research supporting efficacy for vascular and cognitive disorders

dosage.label: Standard Extract:
dosage.description: EGb 761 extract standardized to 24% flavone glycosides and 6% terpene lactones is the research-supported formulation

dosage.label: Clinical Doses:
dosage.description: Typically 120-240mg of standardized extract daily, divided into 2-3 doses

dosage.label: Bioactive Compounds:
dosage.description: Ginkgolides A and B are the primary active terpene lactones with highest systemic exposure

dosage.label: Terminal Half-life:
dosage.description: Ginkgolides have half-lives ranging from 4-13 hours depending on formulation and administration route

sideEffects.label: Carboxylation Effects:
sideEffects.description: Ginkgolides undergo carboxylation in blood which reduces their platelet-activating factor antagonistic activity

sideEffects.label: Drug Interactions:
sideEffects.description: May interact with anticoagulants and other medications due to platelet-activating factor antagonism

sideEffects.label: Generally Well-Tolerated:
sideEffects.description: Most users report minimal side effects when using standardized extracts at recommended doses

sideEffects.label: Individual Variation:
sideEffects.description: Response varies based on genetic factors and baseline cognitive status

availability.label: Widely Available:
availability.description: Ginkgo biloba extracts are among the most commonly used herbal supplements worldwide

availability.label: Standardization Important:
availability.description: Look for EGb 761 or similar standardized extracts rather than non-standardized products

availability.label: Quality Concerns:
availability.description: Avoid purchasing from major retailers due to commingling and counterfeit issues; prefer direct manufacturers or reputable retailers like online retailers
